ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cars" (
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car */,
  "car_name" TEXT /* Name of the car */,
  "car_model" TEXT /* Model of the car */,
  "car_make" TEXT /* Make of the car */,
  "car_year" INTEGER /* Year of the car */,
  "car_type" TEXT /* Type of the car (e.g., F1, IndyCar) */,
  "engine_capacity" REAL /* Engine capacity of the car in liters */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the car */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Name of the driver */,
  "driver_experience" INTEGER /* Experience of the driver in years */,
  "driver_license" TEXT /* Driver's license number */,
  "driver_nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the driver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "track_location" TEXT /* Location of the track */,
  "track_length" REAL /* Length of the track in kilometers */,
  "track_type" TEXT /* Type of the track (e.g., oval, road course) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car used in the session */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver who participated in the session */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track where the session took place */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of the session (e.g., practice, qualifying, race) */,
  "session_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "telemetry_data" (
  "telemetry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each telemetry data point */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session where the data was collected */,
  "frame" INTEGER /* Frame number of the data point */,
  "input.bActivateBoost" INTEGER /* Whether the boost was activated */,
  "input.bHoldingBoost" INTEGER /* Whether the boost was being held */,
  "input.Throttle" REAL /* Throttle value */,
  "input.Steer" REAL /* Steering value */,
  "input.bHandbrake" INTEGER /* Whether the handbrake was applied */,
  "input.Yaw" REAL /* Yaw value */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of the car */,
  "acceleration" REAL /* Acceleration of the car */,
  "brake_pressure" REAL /* Brake pressure */,
  "gear" INTEGER /* Gear of the car */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("telemetry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_telemetry_data_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "car_data" (
  "car_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car data point */,
  "telemetry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the telemetry data point associated with this car data */,
  "car.Location.X" REAL /* X-coordinate of the car's location */,
  "car.Location.Y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the car's location */,
  "car.Location.Z" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the car's location */,
  "car.LinearVelocity.X" REAL /* X-component of the car's linear velocity */,
  "car.LinearVelocity.Y" REAL /* Y-component of the car's linear velocity */,
  "car.LinearVelocity.Z" REAL /* Z-component of the car's linear velocity */,
  "car.Quaternion.X" REAL /* X-component of the car's quaternion */,
  "car.Quaternion.Y" REAL /* Y-component of the car's quaternion */,
  "car.Quaternion.Z" REAL /* Z-component of the car's quaternion */,
  "car.Quaternion.W" REAL /* W-component of the car's quaternion */,
  "car.AngularVelocity.X" REAL /* X-component of the car's angular velocity */,
  "car.AngularVelocity.Y" REAL /* Y-component of the car's angular velocity */,
  "car.AngularVelocity.Z" REAL /* Z-component of the car's angular velocity */,
  "fuel_level" REAL /* Fuel level of the car */,
  "tire_pressure" REAL /* Tire pressure of the car */,
  "oil_temp" REAL /* Oil temperature of the car */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("car_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_data_telemetry_id FOREIGN KEY ("telemetry_id") REFERENCES telemetry_data ("telemetry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the data */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "car_performance" (
  "car_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car performance data point */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session where the performance data was collected */,
  "lap_time" REAL /* Lap time of the car */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed of the car */,
  "top_speed" REAL /* Top speed of the car */,
  "fuel_consumption" REAL /* Fuel consumption of the car */,
  "tire_degradation" REAL /* Tire degradation of the car */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("car_performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_performance_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "driver_performance" (
  "driver_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver performance data point */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session where the performance data was collected */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver who participated in the session */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Points scored by the driver */,
  "penalties_received" INTEGER /* Penalties received by the driver */,
  "overtakes" INTEGER /* Number of overtakes made by the driver */,
  "overtaken" INTEGER /* Number of times the driver was overtaken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_driver_performance_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_driver_performance_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_conditions" (
  "track_conditions_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track conditions data point */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session where the track conditions data was collected */,
  "weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the session */,
  "track_temperature" REAL /* Track temperature during the session */,
  "air_temperature" REAL /* Air temperature during the session */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_conditions_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_conditions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session associated with the data file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cameras" (
  "camera_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each camera */,
  "camera_type" TEXT /* Type of the camera (e.g., onboard, trackside) */,
  "camera_location" TEXT /* Location of the camera */,
  "camera_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the camera */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("camera_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., GPS, accelerometer) */,
  "sensor_location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor */,
  "sensor_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gps_data" (
  "gps_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GPS data point */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session where the GPS data was collected */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the GPS location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the GPS location */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the GPS location */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of the car at the GPS location */,
  "direction" REAL /* Direction of the car at the GPS location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gps_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gps_data_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)
